A regression test script for issue 453 in the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a JavaScript script that initializes a variable `v_0` as an array with a large number of undefined elements. The array is created using a series of commas, which results in an array with many empty slots. The array initialization is enclosed within a `try` block, and any exceptions that occur during this process are caught by an empty `catch` block, which means that any errors will be silently ignored. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily focusing on the creation of a large, sparse array and handling potential errors during this process.
